title: University Life and Classes
focus: Enrollment, class routines, professors, group work, deadlines, exams, feedback, and campus services.

sentences.spanish: Quiero matricularme en Historia de España este semestre.
sentences.english: I want to enroll in History of Spain this semester.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podría explicar de nuevo este concepto?
sentences.english: Could you explain this concept again?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría añadir que el contexto histórico es importante.
sentences.english: I would like to add that the historical context is important.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene horario de tutoría para hablar de mi ensayo?
sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about my essay?

sentences.spanish: Estoy trabajando en un ensayo y necesito comentarios.
sentences.english: I am working on an essay, and I need feedback.

sentences.spanish: ¿Sería posible entregar el ensayo un día más tarde?
sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the essay one day later?

sentences.spanish: Podemos dividir el trabajo: yo me encargo de la introducción.
sentences.english: We can divide the work: I will take care of the introduction.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar materiales sobre este tema?
sentences.english: Where can I find materials about this topic?

sentences.spanish: Para el examen, ¿tenemos que memorizar las fechas o aplicarlo?
sentences.english: For the exam, do we have to memorize the dates or apply it?

sentences.spanish: La oficina internacional me ayudó con la matrícula.
sentences.english: The international office helped me with tuition.

sentences.spanish: Quiero matricularme en Economía internacional este semestre.
sentences.english: I want to enroll in International Economics this semester.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podría explicar de nuevo la diferencia entre los términos?
sentences.english: Could you explain the difference between the terms again?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría añadir que los datos apoyan esa idea.
sentences.english: I would like to add that the data supports that idea.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene horario de tutoría para hablar de el examen?
sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about the exam?

sentences.spanish: Estoy trabajando en una presentación y necesito más fuentes.
sentences.english: I am working on a presentation, and I need more sources.

sentences.spanish: ¿Sería posible entregar el informe el lunes?
sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the report Monday?

sentences.spanish: Podemos dividir el trabajo: yo me encargo de la conclusión.
sentences.english: We can divide the work: I will take care of the conclusion.

sentences.english: Where can I find materials about contemporary history?

sentences.spanish: Para el examen, ¿tenemos que memorizar las definiciones o aplicarlo?
sentences.english: For the exam, do we have to memorize the definitions or apply it?

sentences.english: The international office helped me with the visa.

sentences.english: I would like to add that there are exceptions.

sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about the bibliography?

sentences.english: I am working on a report, and I need reliable data.

sentences.english: Could you explain the objective of the exercise again?

sentences.english: I would like to add that the comparison is not perfect.

sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about my presentation?

sentences.english: Could you explain the required reading again?

sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the project tomorrow in the morning?

sentences.english: Could you explain the grading criterion again?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría añadir que la conclusión necesita más pruebas.
sentences.english: I would like to add that the conclusion needs more evidence.

sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about my questions?

sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the bibliography before Friday?

sentences.spanish: Podemos dividir el trabajo: yo me encargo de la revisión final.
sentences.english: We can divide the work: I will take care of the final review.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podría explicar de nuevo el ejemplo del texto?
sentences.english: Could you explain the example from the text again?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría añadir que podemos aplicar esto a otro caso.
sentences.english: I would like to add that we can apply this to another case.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene horario de tutoría para hablar de la nota?
sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about the grade?

sentences.spanish: Estoy trabajando en una reseña y necesito criterios claros.
sentences.english: I am working on a review, and I need clear criteria.

sentences.spanish: ¿Sería posible entregar la versión final la próxima semana?
sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the final version next week?

sentences.spanish: Podemos dividir el trabajo: yo me encargo de contactar al profesor.
sentences.english: We can divide the work: I will take care of contacting the professor.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podría explicar de nuevo la parte final?
sentences.english: Could you explain the final part again?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría añadir que el problema afecta a muchos estudiantes.
sentences.english: I would like to add that the problem affects many students.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene horario de tutoría para hablar de el plan de estudios?
sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about the study plan?

sentences.english: I would like to add that the definition changes depending on the field.

sentences.english: Would it be possible to submit the data when they are complete?

sentences.english: I would like to add that practical experience also counts.

sentences.english: Do you have office hours to talk about my progress?
